name: Tiger Tank
author: Poki
description: Tiger Tank is a thrilling war game where you command your tank to eliminate all enemies. Drive through battlefields, cooperate with teammates, and strike at the right moment. Choose from famous historical tank models, including light tanks, tank destroyers, medium tanks, and heavy tanks. Each tank comes with unique strengths and weaknesses that you'll need to master in the heat of battle. Are you ready to dominate the battlefield? How to play Tiger Tank? W: move forward S: move back A: move left D: move right Space bar: switch viewport U: zoom out I: zoom in Who created Tiger Tank? Tiger Tank is created by Devoting. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Tiger Tank for free? You can play Tiger Tank for free on Poki. Can I play Tiger Tank on mobile devices and desktop? Tiger Tank can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
